mods.name: Splatoon2 TestMap
mods.author: taiyakisanntarou
mods.description:
I ported the test map from the Splatoon 2 Debug Build to Splatoon 1.

This mod was made on a whim, so I haven't tested it on the console, and there are probably bugs.
mods.changelog:
Updates
Adding a Skybox 3
4d

I ported the skybox and sun position from the Splatoon 2 test map.

I adjusted the color tones of all the textures.
Files

    splatoon2_playertest_30763.zip

Add object 2
2mo

I've ported almost everything, including the moving lift and sample objects!
Fix file 1.1
2mo

Fixed an issue where the downloaded file was incorrect.

Added shadows to the stage.

mods.name: Splatoon 2 colors in Splatoon 1 (color locks)
mods.author: Manto._.lol
mods.description:
Splatoon 1 color lock, splatoon 2 colors
Splatoon 2 colors from turf are now in Splatoon 1, as seperated color locks!

You can only use one color lock! For example if you have purple Vs orange and you wanna have pink Vs yellow, you gotta get the other color lock and restart the game and select it.

  DO NOT REPLACE THE TURF WAR RAW DATA COLOURS WITH THEM, IT WONT WORK! 

Where to put the color lock 
WiiU:
SD:/wiiu/sdcafiine/[TITLE ID]/color lock you choose
Cemu:
/graphicPack/Splatoon/Mods/color lock you choose

mods.name: Parallel Canon Inklings
mods.author: Claygolor
mods.description:
The Intensifying Harmony
This mod replaces Inklings with their Parallel Canon versions from Side Order.
The mod includes the order suit, replacing:

B-ball Headband ------ Parallel Mask
SQUID GIRL Tunic ---- Order Suit Replica
Trail Boots -------------- Order Boot Replicas


NOTE:
This also uses a Static.pack edit in order to "fix" the missing shoulders and chest from the Order Suit, you can just delete the Static.pack if you want to, it's an optional file, in case that you'll use it, please use nohash

mods.name: Koopa inklings! +Yoshi Octolings!
mods.author: Creator      RynoSK8 uPic         Me!  Rival Unpatch Dev (Special Thanks)      CerisWhite         Made Rival octolings work online
mods.description:
Bah bah! Yoshi!
This mod replaces the inklings with koopas and dry bones! It also replaces the rival octolings with Yoshi!
----------------------------------------------
Features:

    Koopa with customizable customizable eyes!
    Dry Bones with customizable customizable eyes!
    Yoshi over Rival octolings with customizable eyes and skin matching with your ink color!
    Optional Ryno version!

----------------------------------------------
Requirements:

    Rival unpatch (only use the plugin it gives, not the player.pack files)
    SplatHeX (or any other way of becoming an octoling) if you want to be yoshi

----------------------------------------------
Plans: 

    Dry bones model (Done!)
    Yoshi over rival octolings (Done!)
    Fixed hat positions (in progress)

mods.name: SplatFest mania (Splat1._.Fest splatfests)
mods.author: Submitter Th3OctoG1rl Key Authors      The splat1._.Fest team         Everything     -273.15         Standby and loading screens
mods.description:
Fests for every1!!
Welcome to splatfest mania, this is a gamebanana page where the fest files used inside Splat1._.Fest will be posted by me, Jelly.
This is made so we can distribute the files more easily.

Current fest (Sunrise vs Sunset) has a new custom sunset look for fests!

What do the files usually include?
-New remodeled fest plaza
-New music
-New Standby intro
-New sounds
-Splatfest colorlock
-The most important thing, splatfest files

DO NOT USE PRETENDO FEST MATCHMAKING, IT DOES NOT WORK AT THE MOMENT 
However, you can vote to get the fest tees. Even tho the fest tees are always added over 2 in-game tees.
EVERYTHING ELSE SHOULD BE ONLINE SAFE ON PRETENDO

How to install custom Splatfests?

 1: Download the files from the page you are in right now. The files will be posted around a week before the Splatfest happens.

2: Follow the instructions for your device! 

-CEMU :     

           1. Copy all the files you downloaded.

           2. Go into your Cemu and open following path:

               mlc01\usr\boss\00050000\(title id)\user\common\data\optdat2

           3. Check  that the names of the downloaded files match the one already existing!!!        

          4. Overwrite the files that are already in there.

          5. If you connect to the internet now ( and the Fest/Preparation has begun) you should be able   to see the Splatfest announcement.

-WII U:    

            1. Boot up your Wii U and open FTPiiU on the plugins menu

            2. Connect to the Wii U via Filezilla by entering the Wii U's IP and port inside there.

            3. Search for following path:

    storage_mlc/usr/boss/00050000/(title id)/user/common/data/optdat2

            4. Check  that the names of the downloaded files match the one already existing!!!

            5. Overwrite the files in there.

            6. Disconnect Filezilla and open the game. 

            7. The Fest should show up.

Please backup your Save-Data and the data you replace.

Title ID's: 10162b00 = JPN, 1017e300 = EU, 10176900= US

How do I join matches?
-Join the discord server! link: https://discord.gg/QX94gvsvwS
-Ask if anyone is matchmaking or if the fest is still up
-Have fun!

Credits: 
-HSS for making the loading screen and standby
